query:
-- All active users with location info
SELECT id, name, email, phone, role, "userMode",
       "workerLocation", "preferredCity", "workerSearchCity",
       "workerLatitude", "workerLongitude",
       "notificationPrefs"
FROM users
WHERE status = 'active'
ORDER BY role, name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ShrASiucEBBHq4.29f4086d1d74 --database REsBLBseSeXTZwj6TLp8WJ --execute

       "workerLocation", "preferredCity", "workerSearchCity",
       "workerLatitude", "workerLongitude",
       "notificationPrefs"
FROM users
WHERE status = 'active'
ORDER BY role, name;
